themes.label: Covenant
themes.summary: This chapter points to covenant, promise, oath, inheritance, or the enduring faithfulness of God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 7 verses. Commentary leans on "For the tribe of the children of Reuben according to the house of their fathers, and the trib...". Word-study detail reinforces "וַֽחֲצִי֙: their inheritance and half - the half or middle".

18: Take one leader from each tribe to distribute the land

themes.label: Obedience
themes.summary: This chapter stresses hearing, keeping, following, or walking in God’s commands. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Word-study detail reinforces "צַ֞ו: Command - (intensively) to constitute, enjoin".
